fields.Name: YourMembership
fields.Description: YourMembership (Community Brands AMS) REST integration. Base URL https://ws.yourmembership.com, ServiceStack 5.0.2 backend. Supports two auth flows: (1) session-cookie via POST /Ams/Authenticate returning a SessionId used as the x-ss-id header (15-minute TTL); (2) OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code + Refresh Token via /OAuth/GetToken (RFC 6749 shape) or /OAuth/GetAccessToken (legacy AppId/AppSecret shape). Every /Ams call is parameterised by ClientID. Pagination is PageSize+PageNumber (1-indexed) with ListCount in the response envelope; responses always carry a ResponseStatus shape on success and on error.

fields.Name: JwtIssuer
fields.Description: JWT issuer surface. Exposes (a) the JWKS public-key set at GET /.well-known/jwks used by clients to verify YM-issued JWT signatures, and (b) the JWT generation endpoint at POST /Ams/Auth/GetJwt that mints a token for the calling session. OpenAPI 2.0 spec: response schema for /.well-known/jwks is JwksResponse{keys:JwkKey[]} per RFC 7517; response schema for /Ams/Auth/GetJwt is JwtIssuerResponse{token}. Both endpoints declared deprecated=false. The GET surface is the canonical read; the POST surface is auth-flow plumbing.

fields.Name: kty
fields.Description: Key Type — RSA, EC, oct, etc. RFC 7517 §4.1.

fields.Name: kid
fields.Description: Key ID — opaque per-key identifier; clients select the verification key by matching kid in the JWT header. NOT marked as primary key in the OpenAPI spec.

fields.Name: use
fields.Description: Public-key Use — typically "sig" (signature) for JWT verification. RFC 7517 §4.2.

fields.Name: alg
fields.Description: Algorithm — e.g., RS256, ES256. RFC 7517 §4.4.

fields.Name: n
fields.Description: RSA modulus (base64url-encoded). Only present for RSA keys. RFC 7518 §6.3.1.1.

fields.Name: e
fields.Description: RSA public exponent (base64url-encoded). Only present for RSA keys. RFC 7518 §6.3.1.2.

fields.Name: OAuthToken
fields.Description: OAuth 2.0 token issuance + refresh endpoints for YourMembership. Three concrete operations are exposed under the OAuth tag: (1) POST /OAuth/GetAccessToken — legacy ServiceStack form (AppId + AppSecret + GrantType=Code|RefreshToken; AppSecert is documented as deprecated in the OpenAPI summary); (2) POST /OAuth/GetToken — RFC 6749 shape (grant_type=authorization_code|refresh_token, client_id/client_secret/code/refresh_token/redirect_uri/scope); (3) POST /OAuth/OIDC/GetAccessToken — OIDC variant with the same RFC 6749 parameter set. All three consume application/x-www-form-urlencoded and produce application/json. INFORMATIONAL surface (auth-flow, not a data entity), exposed as an IO at user request so the auth surface is queryable in MJ metadata.

fields.Name: Auth
fields.Description: ServiceStack session-auth endpoint at /auth. Supports HTTP methods: GET, PUT, POST, DELETE. All four methods accept the same parameter set and return the shared AuthenticateResponse envelope (UserId, SessionId, UserName, DisplayName, ReferrerUrl, BearerToken, RefreshToken, ResponseStatus, Meta). Tag: 'auth'. Note: per SOURCE_STUDY §3.4, this is the framework-level session-auth surface; production YM clients typically use /Ams/Authenticate (session-cookie) or /OAuth/GetToken (OAuth 2.0) instead. Captured here for surface completeness and operator visibility.

fields.Name: ResponseEnvelope
fields.Description: ServiceStack response envelope wrapping every /Ams response. Carries the ListCount / PageSize / PageNumber pagination triple, the IsForceReload + UsingRedis caching hints, and the ResponseStatus error block. This is a *schema* IO — not a directly-callable endpoint — emitted so downstream sync logic can reference the canonical envelope shape. Evidenced by OpenAPI definition `CampaignEmailListsResponse` and by the shared shape across 223 *Response definitions in the spec; narrated in the REST API Getting Started PDF (2021) page 8.

fields.Name: ListCount
fields.Description: Total count of items matching the query (across all pages). Returned by every paginated /Ams response.

fields.Name: PageSize
fields.Description: Number of items per page (echo of the request PageSize parameter; 1-indexed pagination).

fields.Name: PageNumber
fields.Description: Current 1-indexed page number (echo of the request PageNumber parameter).

fields.Name: IsForceReload
fields.Description: ServiceStack hint that the cache layer was forced to reload for this response.

fields.Name: UsingRedis
fields.Description: ServiceStack hint indicating the Redis cache was consulted to serve this response.

fields.Name: ResponseStatus
fields.Description: Nested ResponseStatus object carrying ErrorCode, Message, StackTrace, Errors[] (ResponseError items), and Meta. Present on every response (success or error).
